MeasurementRecord.title: Measurement Record
MeasurementRecord.description: A record of a logistics measurement calculation.

userId.description: The ID of the user who created the record.

length.description: Length of the package in cm.

width.description: Width of the package in cm.

height.description: Height of the package in cm.

actualWeight.description: Actual weight of the package in kg.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the record was created.

users/{userId}/measurements/{measurement.description: Measurement records belonging to a specific user.
